get_involved_and_help_spread_bitcoin: Bamba iqhaza futhi usize ukusabalalisa i-Bitcoin
get_involved_description: Izinsiza zethu zamahhala zenza kube lula ukusabalalisa ukwamukelwa kwe-Bitcoin.
get_involved_intro_1: Kungadabukisa ukuphila esimweni samanje somhlaba wethu.
get_involved_intro_2: Imali yethu iphukile. Ngenxa yalokho, izingxenye eziyisisekelo zomphakathi nazo ziphukile.
get_involved_intro_3: Uma usuvele usebenzisa i-Bitcoin, uyayazi imizwa yethemba i-Bitcoin engayiletha. Ithemba lekusasa eliqhakazile elenzeka ngemali engcono.
get_involved_intro_4: Kodwa abantu abaningi abakuzungezile abazi nge-Bitcoin. Bahlala emhlabeni ophukile njengawe, kodwa ngaphandle kwekhanyiso lethemba lokubisiza ebumnyameni.
get_involved_intro_5: Kodwa ungasiza ukushintsha lokho. Senze izinsiza zamahhala eziningi ukuze kube lula ukusabalalisa ithemba elilethwa yi-Bitcoin kulabo abakuzungezile.
get_involved_sticker_content_1: Ungasiza ukufundisa abakuzungezile nge-Bitcoin ngaphandle kokudinga ukuhlangana naye. Beka nje esinye sezitika zethu ze-Bitcoin zamahhala emphakathini.
get_involved_sticker_content_2: Amakhulu abantu askena amakhodi e-QR kule zitika nyanga zonke. Izitika zenfleshini zixhumana nekhasi nge
get_involved_sticker_content_4: Izinye izitika zixhumana nekhasi lethu lemfundo lasekhaya elibonisa abantu indlela
get_involved_sticker_content_6: Ngokubeka lezi zitika emphakathini wakho ezindaweni abantu abazozibona, ungasiza abakuzungezile bathathe izinyathelo zabo zokuqala emgodini we-Bitcoin.
get_involved_postcard_content_1: Ungasiza ukusabalalisa Ithemba le-Bitcoin kumuntu omaziyo ngokumthumelela elinye lamakhadi ethu okuthumela amahhala.
get_involved_postcard_content_2: Ngemuva kwekhadi ngalinye lokuthumela kuneqoqo elithokozisayo nge-Bitcoin kanye nekhodi ye-QR yokufunda kabanzi.
get_involved_postcard_content_3: Ngokuthumela umuntu ikhadi lokuthumela le-Bitcoin, ungamsiza abone i-Bitcoin ngendlela entsha.
get_involved_business_content_1: Ufuna ukusiza ukwakha umnotho wekhulu we-Bitcoin? Ikhithi yethu ye-Bitcoin Business Kit yenza kube lula ukuthinta ibhizinisi ngokwamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin.
get_involved_business_content_2: Ikhithi yebhizinisi ngayinye ifaka amaphepha aveza izinzuzo zokwamukela izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin. Iphepha ngalinye lixhumana nezinhlobo ezahlukene ze
